english: love (between a man and a woman)

etymology.description: 愛(愛) (ài, "love") as affection or deep feeling, and 情(情) (qíng, "emotion; sentiment") as emotional state or sentiment, together denote romantic feelings.
etymology.interpretation: 愛(愛) (ài, "love") illustrates deep attachment and commitment, which is the foundation of a romantic bond. 情(情) (qíng, "emotion; sentiment") captures the subjective, often passionate, feelings between partners. Together, 愛情 (àiqíng) emphasizes romantic love, characterized by both commitment and passionate emotional connection.

examples.chinese: 爱情是我们生活中的一部分(愛情是我們生活中的一部分)。
examples.pinyin: Àiqíng shì wǒmen shēnghuó zhōng de yī bùfèn.
examples.english: Love is a part of our lives.

examples.chinese: 在电影里(在電影裡)，爱情总是充满挑战(愛情總是充滿挑戰)。
examples.pinyin: Zài diànyǐng lǐ, àiqíng zǒng shì chōngmǎn tiǎozhàn.
examples.english: In movies, love is always full of challenges.

examples.chinese: 他的小说里描述了很多种爱情(他的小說裡描述了很多種愛情)。
examples.pinyin: Tā de xiǎoshuō lǐ miáoshù le hěn duō zhǒng àiqíng.
examples.english: His novels describe many types of love.
